scripts.dev: npm run publish-backend-dev && concurrently -k "npx vite --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5173" "npx tsc -p tsconfig.main.json --watch" "npx tsc -p tsconfig.preload.json --watch" "npx electron ."
scripts.dev:prod: npm run publish-backend-dev && concurrently -k "npx vite --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5173" "npx tsc -p tsconfig.main.json --watch" "npx tsc -p tsconfig.preload.json --watch" "npx electron . --prod"
scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.main.json && tsc -p tsconfig.preload.json && vite build
